front: Describe the mechanisms of antibody-dependent cellular phagocytosis (ADCP).
back: ADCP: antibodies opsonize targets, Fc receptors on macrophages/neutrophils mediate phagocytosis. Fc-gamma receptors (Fc-gR I, II, III) have different affinities. ADCP is important for bacterial clearance and antibody-mediated tumor killing. Enhanced by complement.
